about.heading: Indian Real Estate, Decoded with Data.
about.title: Simplifying Decisions with 62+ Data Points
about.description: We believe Indian real estate shouldn't be a black box. Our institutional-grade analytical engine processes over 62 distinct structural, legal, and transactional data points to simplify complex investment decisions and build trust.

featureBlocks.title: Dual-Mode Security
featureBlocks.desc: Designed equally to guide prospective buyers and secure active property portfolios.

featureBlocks.title: 62 Distinct Data Fields
featureBlocks.desc: Granular analysis crossing RERA registration records, court cases, and active market yields.

faqHeader.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqHeader.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the FollowProperty real estate intelligence network.

faq.question: How does the valuation work?
faq.answer: We run a proprietary 4-source median formula pulling from official RERA registration indexes, real-time builder pricing data, local circle rates, and actual transaction histories to compute true valuations.

faq.question: Can I track multiple properties?
faq.answer: Yes. Each property in your watchlist or active portfolio is tracked and managed separately with its own customized yield, EMI, and appreciation dashboard.

faq.question: When will it launch?
faq.answer: Our beta testing platform launches in Q3 2026. Secure your early access spot today by joining our waitlist.

teamHeader.title: Meet the Core Team
teamHeader.subtitle: The visionary engineers and analysts building tomorrow's real estate tracking systems.

items.title: Trust Through Transparency
items.desc: Real estate shouldn't be a speculative black box. We expose circle rates, court filings, and builder compliance indices openly so you can track with confidence.

items.title: Democratizing Yield Analytics
items.desc: Making powerful, institutional-grade valuation formulas and real-time yield dashboards accessible to every homeowner and prospective property buyer.

items.title: Actionable, Non-Biased Data
items.desc: No fake listings. No sponsored builder hypes. We run raw, multi-source algorithmic equations to deliver verified, unbiased property intelligence.

team.name: Fritz Dsouza
team.bio: A veteran real estate tech entrepreneur with over 12 years of experience. Fritz founded FollowProperty to eliminate information asymmetry in property markets.

team.name: Rohit Talwar
team.bio: Systems architect and developer focused on real estate analytics, circle rate scraping engines, and data ledger transparency.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: Expert in predictive modeling and quantitative valuation formulas. Former housing risk analyst with 8+ years of property analytics experience.

team.name: Arjun Mehta
team.bio: UX specialist crafted in secure, high-converting financial interfaces. Passionate about bringing clarity to complex analytical data dashboards.
